_publications._publicationTitle: A novel imaging-compatible sciatic nerve schwannoma model.
_publications._context: Human schwannoma cell line HEI-193 was established from a benign schwannoma tumor from an NF2 patient immortalized with retroviral mediated HPV E6-E7 gene expression | HEI-193 schwannoma cells were a gift from Marco Giovannini and cultured in Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium | We have successfully grown murine NF2 −/− Schwann cells in syngeneic mice and human HEI-193 schwannoma cells in nude mice to establish schwannomas in the CPA model. | The HEI-193, an HPV E6-E7 immortalized schwannoma cell line, was a kind gift from Dr. Weg M. Ongkeko

_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenetic reprogramming shapes the cellular landscape of schwannoma.
A cerebellopontine angle mouse model for the investigation of tumor biology, hearing, and neurological function in NF2-related vestibular schwannoma.
Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.
